failures.description: The agent misread or misused the ProductCatalogSearch result and selected the wrong item as cheapest. The correct answer should have been item_id 1240311797 at $137.17.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The relevant tool output was available at index 3 and was sorted by ascending price. The first item was item_id 1240311797 at $137.17, making it the cheapest available Electric Kettle. At index 4, the Executor synthesized an answer using item_id 2243454707 at $164.46, which is the last and most expensive listed item, contradicting the tool result. This is not an invalid tool invocation, unsupported intent, or underspecified request; it is incorrect reasoning over the returned evidence.
